outcomes: Understand nature of matter, properties, measurement, uncertainty, laws of chemical combination, Dalton's atomic theory
Calculate atomic/molecular masses, mole concept, molar mass, percentage composition, stoichiometry
Trace discoveries of sub-atomic particles and development leading to Bohr's model

learning_outcomes.unit_name: Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties
learning_outcomes.chapter_name: Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties
outcomes: Apply modern periodic law and interpret the present form of Periodic Table
Apply Kossel-Lewis approach and understand Ionic/Electrovalent bonds
Analyze applications of thermodynamics and measurement of ∆U and ∆H
Apply Law of Chemical Equilibrium and interpret relationship between K, Q, and Gibbs Energy
Classify redox reactions based on classical ideas and electron transfer mechanisms

learning_outcomes.unit_name: Organic Chemistry: Some basic Principles and Techniques
outcomes: Apply structural representations and classification of organic compounds
Differentiate between types of hydrocarbons based on structure and bonding
